perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video. A middle-aged man wearing a denim cap, glasses, and a light blue t-shirt stands in a room with warm lighting, holding a black Vivo X300 Pro box. (2) He opens the box and pulls out the smartphone, which is wrapped in a translucent protective sleeve. He proceeds to peel off a long strip of plastic film from the back of the device. (3) He displays the contents of the box, including a white charger, a USB-C cable, and a light-colored protective case. (4) The scene shifts to a table where a specialized telephoto lens attachment (doubler) is mounted on the phone. The man points his finger next to the lens to demonstrate its length. (5) The man holds the phone and uses the screen to demonstrate the zoom capability, focusing on another man's face in the room, showing high levels of detail through the digital interface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with an energetic and friendly tone, introducing himself and the product. No background music is detected. (2) A sharp, rhythmic tearing sound is heard as the plastic film is peeled off the phone. (3) The male voice continues to describe the accessories in the box with a consistent, professional pace. (4) The audio captures the ambient noise of a room with multiple people, including faint background chatter and movement sounds. (5) The speaker's voice becomes more excited as he demonstrates the lens, emphasizing the clarity of the image.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '大家好 T/3哥' - Greeting to the audience. (2) Decorative Text: '已經拿到了 Vivo X300 Pro' - Hook highlighting the early access to the product. (3) Functional Text: '撕開它的聲音' - Emphasizing the ASMR-like sound of the plastic peeling. (4) Functional Text: '有充電線, 插頭, 專屬的殼' - Inventory of box contents. (5) Hook: '這就是增距鏡' - Identifying the telephoto lens. (6) Reaction: '超清楚的' - Emotional emphasis on the camera's clarity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Unboxing accessories -> Close-up of hardware -> Telephoto lens feature demonstration.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 subject being filmed (阿輝), 3 people in the background during the zoom demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a denim newsboy-style cap, thin-framed glasses, a light blue t-shirt, and wooden bead bracelets on his wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor setting with a large window showing a city view, patterned carpet, and office-style furniture where a launch event or review session is likely taking place.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light from windows supplemented by indoor warm overhead lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing -> Product Demo -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an early look (unboxing) at the Vivo X300 Pro smartphone and demonstrate its key selling point: the high-quality telephoto lens and zoom capabilities.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of brand name, product box, and specific features presented as a review.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Denim cap, light blue shirt, wooden bead accessories, signature greeting style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets tech enthusiasts interested in high-end mobile photography. The use of a physical lens accessory (doubler) is a rare signature feature for this specific phone model.
